title: TreeDB GUI
csp_connect_src: _comment: The TreeDB browser connects to backends the USER configures at runtime (in the connection picker), on ARBITRARY hosts, plus the co-located auth BFF. A fixed origin allowlist cannot express that, so allow the wss: and https: schemes broadly — the user controls which hosts it talks to and the choice is stored locally in the browser. ws://localhost is for local dev only (mixed content blocks plain ws from the HTTPS prod app anyway).
